'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 30''' was the thirtieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 24]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Captives of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]
*[[Alliance Army/Legends|Rebel Troops]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Theed Hangar/Legends|Theed Hangar]]
*[[CLL-8 binary load lifter|CLL-8 Binary Load Lifter]]
*[[Tractor beam/Legends|Tractor Beams]]
*[[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|Rebel Transport]]
